category_sources: Official sourcehut project https://git.sr.ht/~sircmpwn/scdoc is the upstream source for scdoc.
source_facts.description says it is a small man page generator.
display_name_sources: Official sourcehut project is named scdoc.
docs_sources: Official scdoc manpage source is maintained in the upstream repository.
Official sourcehut repository README is the best official docs entry point.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive identify the official sourcehut repository.
tags_sources: Official source repository contains the C implementation and scdoc manpage sources.
